---
title: Mini Step 1
sidebar:
  order: 1
---

```cfm {test:tutorial step=1 file="config/routes.cfm" mode="write"}
<cfscript>
mapper()
    .get(name="ping", pattern="/ping", to="home##ping")
    .root(to="home##index", method="get")
    .wildcard()
.end();
</cfscript>
```

```cfm {test:tutorial step=1 file="app/controllers/Home.cfc" mode="write"}
component extends="Controller" {
    function index() {}
    function ping() {
        renderText("pong");
    }
}
```

{/* This block runs BEFORE step-2 starts the dev server, so the only
    deterministic outcome is the documented no-running-server refusal.
    resetFixture() scrubs the scaffold's pinned port 8080 onto a closed
    ephemeral port (#3170 review), which makes the refusal independent of
    whatever the contributor has listening on 8080/60000/3000/8500 —
    previously this block could attach to a stray local listener and was
    one of the known soft-failures the docs-verify workflow tolerates. */}

```bash {test:cli step=1 cmd="wheels reload" asserts-output="No running Wheels server" asserts-exit=1}
wheels reload
```
